text: Gloomy clouds engulf the streets of London in a cold haze and as the shrill steam whistle heralds the start of a new era, while ambition overflows in the shadows… *CRACK* It was with a crack of thunder and rain coming from your broken window that you jolted awake, well that, and the constant pounding at the door. “Open up!” a gruff voice outside the feeble wooden door yelled. “You owe 35 shillings and I better have them by the marrow or it’s your liver on the line”

exit.trigger: Try to talk ur way out of it
Grovel at the fellow’s feet, lick his boots, and promise to get the money to him
Jump out the window and go on the run
